_comment: Optional preferences for the cohort viewer (cyf_cohort.html). Every key is optional. Load it with the 'Load config…' button, drag it onto the page, or pass ?config=... in the URL. Build/edit one interactively with 'Build config…'. Colors drive the HTML viewer AND the R export; the 'plot' section standardizes the R/ggplot2 figures for papers.

export._comment: HTML PNG download buttons (Plotly). Not the R/PDF export.

plot._comment: Baked into the generated R/ggplot2 script (→ editable, embedded-font vector PDF via cairo_pdf). Per-plot PDF dimensions in inches.

stats._comment: Between-group significance brackets on the box plot. test: wilcox.test|t.test. label: stars (*, **, ***)|pvalue (p = / p <). tip_length 0 = flat bars (no end caps). Bracket line and p-value text are colored separately; comparisons with p < sig_threshold use sig_color.
stats.label: stars
